Women's New Arrivals

  1. Women's
  2. New Arrivals

New Arrivals for Women

We love it when new arrivals hit the site. At Abercrombie & Fitch, we are constantly updating our assortment with brand new apparel & accessories and seasonal colors & fabrics. From current trends to timeless classics, we aim to keep your closet as versatile as possible with pieces you’ll love all year long.

Looking for a new dress? We offer an amazing selection of womens dresses, from off the shoulder styles to short-sleeve shift dresses, even bohemian-chic maxi dresses. For work, school, weekend, special occasion, or for no reason at all, there’s nothing better than a new dress. With every season comes a new essential style and the same can be said for our collection of tops. New tops are arriving all the time. From classic button down shirts to cold-shoulder silhouettes, our collection is always up to speed on the forever favorites as well as the latest trends. Your favorite womens t-shirt in the very softest cotton. Your essential go-to sweater in a cardigan or pullover. We’ll keep your closet full and current all year around. Keep an eye on our womens jeans. New jeans are always a good idea, and our selection of denim is ever evolving. But one thing that never changes is the quality. From trendy distressed details and embroidery to the tried and true blue jean, we always have that new denim style you’ve been hoping to find, in every classic and seasonal wash you love. Our selection of women's accessories & jewelry is also always up to date. Ball caps. Leather bags. Sunglasses. Scarves. We keep the rotation going so you can always find the perfect finishing touches for any and every look, from statement jewelry to new shoes.

Everything you need for a current closet full of your favorites is here at Abercrombie & Fitch. Be sure to click on “New Arrivals” any time you visit the site to make sure you’re always up on the latest in womens clothing and accessories.

Real quick, a few legal things:
    +Offer valid online only March 3, 2026 to March 24, 2026 in US/CA. Offer applies to clearance merchandise only. Online price reflects discount.

    We use cookies for several purposes, like:

        Enhancing your overall shopping experience
        Improving functionality and security

    If you choose to "Accept All," we'll also use cookies for things like:

        Providing personalised product recommendations
        Tailoring content based on your preferences
        Gathering insights to better understand you as a customer

      Cookie Notice

    Privacy Preference Center

    We use first-party and third-party cookies or other technologies to store or retrieve information on your device (we’ll refer to them all as “cookies”) on this website. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Using the options below, you can choose to activate any non-essential cookies accordance to your preferences. Essential cookies are always active and cannot be refused as they are needed to make the site work. Blocking some types of non-essential cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.

    For more information, you can click on the different category headings below. Our Cookie Notice has detailed information on the specific cookies used, their duration and the third-parties involves.

    You can manage your preferences at any time by revisiting this Privacy Preferences Center using the Manage My Preferences link at the bottom of our website. You can also visit our Privacy Notice here.


    Cookie Notice

    Manage Consent Preferences

    Essential Cookies

    Always Active

    These cookies are essential for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems.

    Performance Cookies

    Active

    These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

    Functional/ Personalization Cookies

    Active

    These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

    Targeting Cookies

    Active

    These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
